initiatives.name: alpha Idaho
initiatives.description: No cost programs include: HIV and STD testing & treatment, syringe/needle exchange, and an on-site food pantry.

initiatives.name: Boise Mutual Aid
initiatives.description: Mutual aid is when community is empowered to meet their own needs, while also organizing against the system that created the need in the first place.

initiatives.name: Feed the 2C Idaho
initiatives.description: Updates on "The Caldwell Community Fridge" at the Flying M-Caldwell- Idaho. Take what you need. Leave what you can.

initiatives.name: Boise Street Medics
initiatives.description: A Boise community health initiative made by local activists. Staffed with local EMTs.

initiatives.name: Boise Kitchen Collective
initiatives.description: Free homecooked meals every Wednesday, 5:30 p.m. at 511 S. Americana Blvd! No questions asked or documentation required

initiatives.name: Boise River Valley Coordinating Council
initiatives.description: Building Community, Culture, and Solidarity in the Boise Metro Area
